instructions: This is a private-fund Limited Partner capital account statement. Extract the LP-level fields. Return monetary amounts as plain positive numbers (no symbols, no commas, no parentheses) - report the MAGNITUDE even for deductions shown in parentheses like ($652,000). Dates as ISO YYYY-MM-DD. currency is the 3-letter ISO code (default USD).

descriptions.lp_name: the Limited Partner / investor this statement is for
descriptions.period_end: the period-end / 'as of' date, as ISO YYYY-MM-DD
descriptions.opening_balance: opening / beginning capital account balance for the period
descriptions.contributions: capital contributions during the period (positive magnitude)
descriptions.distributions: distributions during the period (positive magnitude, 0 if none)
descriptions.management_fee: management fee charged during the period (positive magnitude)
descriptions.unrealized_gain: unrealized gain or loss allocated during the period (negative if a loss)
descriptions.preferred_return: preferred return accrued during the period (positive magnitude)
descriptions.closing_balance: closing / ending capital account balance for the period
